personal.description: An individual user's private governed space. No shared access.

group.description: A collective of users with shared governance and access.

brain.description: A sovereign AI-governed distribution node. Public or semi-public.

sparxstar.description: The SPARXSTAR platform. Primary creative and distribution system.

aiwa.description: AI West Africa platform. Cultural knowledge governance system.

player.description: Playback and consumption surface for media artifacts.

editor.description: Creation and editing surface for artifacts and lexicon.

archive.description: Long-term preservation and retrieval of governed content.

marketplace.description: Exchange surface for governed artifacts and transactions.

ingestion.description: Intake pipeline for raw artifacts entering the system.

streaming.description: Real-time continuous delivery of audio or media.

governance.description: Rules, permissions, and policy enforcement layer.

discovery.description: Search, recommendation, and surfacing of content.

ingestion.description: Batch or stream intake of raw content.

artifact.description: A produced, stored, or transmitted content object such as audio, image, or document.

lexicon.description: Language constructs — words, phrases, tokens, and linguistic units.

context.description: Session, state, configuration, and environmental runtime data.

wallet.description: Financial and transactional records governing exchange and payment.

audio.description: A sound artifact — speech, music, or audio recording. Not text derived from audio.

word.description: An atomic lexical unit. A single token of language, not a phrase or sentence.

session.description: A bounded interaction state between a user or agent and the system.

transaction.description: A financial or exchange operation with governance and audit trail.

create.description: Bring a new resource into existence. The resource did not exist before this action.

read.description: Retrieve a resource without modification. The resource is unchanged after this action.

update.description: Modify an existing resource. The resource must already exist.

delete.description: Permanently remove a resource. This action is irreversible.

transcribe.description: Convert spoken audio to written text. Input must be audio. Output is text.

translate.description: Convert content between languages or formats. Not the same as transcribe.

validate.description: Verify that a resource meets correctness or compliance standards. Does not modify the resource.

resolve.description: Handle an error, conflict, or ambiguous state to reach a defined outcome.

archive.description: Move a resource to long-term governed storage. Resource remains accessible but is no longer active.

execute.description: Run a defined computational process or pipeline. Used when no more specific action applies.

publish.description: Make a resource externally available. Resource moves from private to governed public state.
